questions.audioText: Woman: How many brothers and sisters do you have? Man: I have one brother and two sisters. I am the oldest. Woman: That must be fun!
questions.question: How many siblings does the man have?

questions.audioText: Receptionist: The gym is open from six in the morning to ten at night. You need to show your membership card at the front desk.
questions.question: What do you need to enter the gym?

questions.audioText: Girl: Dad, can we go to the zoo this Saturday? Dad: Sure, but let's go in the morning before it gets too hot. Girl: Great! I want to see the lions and the elephants.
questions.question: Why does the dad want to go in the morning?

questions.audioText: Neighbor 1: Your dog barked all night. I couldn't sleep. Neighbor 2: I'm so sorry. He's not used to the new house yet. I'll get him some training.
questions.question: What is the problem?

questions.audioText: Tour guide: Welcome to the museum. This painting was made over two hundred years ago by a famous French artist. Please do not touch the paintings.
questions.question: What is the guide asking visitors not to do?

questions.audioText: Man: I want to send this package to Japan. Post office clerk: That will be twenty-five dollars for standard shipping. It takes about two weeks.
questions.question: How long does standard shipping take?

questions.audioText: Amy: I'm learning to cook Italian food. Last night I made pasta with tomato sauce. It was a little salty, but my family liked it.
questions.question: What did Amy cook last night?

questions.audioText: Radio host: The weather this weekend will be rainy on Saturday, but Sunday will be sunny and warm. A perfect day for outdoor activities.
questions.question: What will the weather be like on Sunday?

questions.audioText: Boss: The meeting is at three o'clock. Please bring the sales report. Employee: I haven't finished it yet. Boss: Then finish it before the meeting.
questions.question: What does the employee need to finish?

questions.audioText: Woman: I'm looking for a birthday present for my mother. She loves reading. Sales assistant: We have some nice books over here. This one is very popular.
questions.question: What does the woman want to buy?
